design_plan: rng=42; AIDA=pass; hero_lines=2.4; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; labels_checked=all competitors mentioned; button_contrast=AA+
headline: Super vs Grok — Personal AI Agents Compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Grok. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Grok

summary: Grok is pushing fast, low‑cost agentic models and developer tooling. Super is built for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer — and gets faster and cheaper over time by reusing a computer‑use cache for repeated workflows.
